name: OpenClaw Memory Plus
description: Upgrade-safe, file-first memory plugin with semantic, episodic, reflective, and identity layers.

autoRecall.label: Auto Recall
autoRecall.help: Inject a bounded recall frame before each agent run.

autoCapture.label: Auto Capture
autoCapture.help: Capture candidate memories from turns and tool results.

enableSlowPathLifecycle.label: Slow Path Lifecycle
enableSlowPathLifecycle.help: Allow best-effort promotion/summarization on lifecycle flush hooks.

defaultAgentId.label: Default Agent Id
defaultAgentId.help: Fallback agent id when runtime metadata does not provide one.

storeRoot.label: Store Root Override
storeRoot.help: Optional path template relative to the OpenClaw home.
